consumer_facing_capability_limits.statement: The agent may explain cited PP&D public guidance and identify missing, stale, ambiguous, or conflicting user facts, but it must not represent its output as an official City decision.

citations.claim: Consumer copy must say the agent can summarize cited PP&D requirements, compare known facts to process requirements, and draft reversible previews only.
Only read-only DevHub review and public-source lookup scenarios are released to consumers.

consumer_facing_capability_limits.statement: The release is validated from committed fixtures and does not depend on live crawl results, live DevHub state, private account data, or live LLM responses.

citations.claim: Validation used committed fixtures and did not contact live LLM services or DevHub.

consumer_facing_capability_limits.statement: The agent must stop before any official submission, certification, upload, scheduling, cancellation, extension, reactivation, purchase, or payment step.

citations.claim: The consumer handoff must block official submission, certification, upload, purchase, inspection scheduling, cancellation, extension or reactivation request, payment-detail entry, and final payment.
Draft-preview work must remain reversible and must stop before official attach, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or payment.

supported_safe_read_only_scenarios.statement: Review public PP&D guidance, forms, permit-process notes, fee notices, and file-preparation rules using cited source evidence.

citations.claim: Supported safe scenarios are public-source explanation, account-scoped status review after user login, fee notice review, correction request review, attachment list review, and inspection-result review.

supported_safe_read_only_scenarios.statement: After the user completes any login manually, review account-scoped permit status, correction requests, fee notices, attachment lists, and inspection results without changing the official record.

citations.claim: Supported safe scenarios are public-source explanation, account-scoped status review after user login, fee notice review, correction request review, attachment list review, and inspection-result review.
Only read-only DevHub review and public-source lookup scenarios are released to consumers.

reversible_draft_preview_boundaries.statement: Prepare local draft field mappings, document checklists, and PDF/form preview values only when the user can inspect and discard them before use.

citations.claim: Draft-preview work must remain reversible and must stop before official attach, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or payment.
Consumer copy must say the agent can summarize cited PP&D requirements, compare known facts to process requirements, and draft reversible previews only.

reversible_draft_preview_boundaries.statement: Draft assistance may stage reversible values or save a draft only when the workflow has not reached certification, official attachment, submission, scheduling, cancellation, purchase, or payment.

citations.claim: Draft-preview work must remain reversible and must stop before official attach, certification, submission, scheduling, cancellation, or payment.
Consequential official actions require attended user handoff and action-specific confirmation outside the released autonomous consumer capability.

blocked_consequential_action_messages.message: I cannot submit a permit request. Please review the prepared draft and complete the official submission yourself while present in DevHub.

citations.claim: The consumer handoff must block official submission, certification, upload, purchase, inspection scheduling, cancellation, extension or reactivation request, payment-detail entry, and final payment.
Consequential official actions require attended user handoff and action-specific confirmation outside the released autonomous consumer capability.

no_live_llm.statement: Final smoke did not invoke a live LLM.

citations.claim: The final smoke packet confirmed the handoff path has no live service calls and no mutation side effects.
